description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a central open courtyard. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, featuring numerous symmetrically arranged windows with decorative shutters. The house includes a double garage, a prominent main entryway with glass double doors, and a spacious balcony or terrace area on the upper floor. The interior is visible from above, revealing multiple furnished rooms, including a large dining area, living spaces, and bedrooms. Outdoor seating is present near the entry, and the overall design is clean and modern with subtle classical influences.
description: A two-story light-colored house with a central courtyard, symmetrical windows, double garage, and a prominent glass entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entryway with glass double doors, outdoor seating, and a clear look into the central courtyard and dining area.
description_view_1: This side highlights the upper floor rooms and windows, with less visibility of the entryway and more focus on the rear and side rooms.
description_view_2: This angle features the double garage, main entry, and a broad view of the central courtyard and living spaces.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the rear of the house, showing the upper balcony, multiple windows, and the back portion of the courtyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with sidelights, small steps, and outdoor seating; no porch or columns, clean modern lines.
